name: codex-debugger
description: Debugging escalation plugin that automatically consults OpenAI Codex (GPT-5) when stuck after three failed attempts with no progress. Features codex-escalation agent with pre-flight validation, context gathering, and progressive escalation (Codex -> User). Includes /codex-check command for setup verification. Requires Codex CLI and OpenAI account. Uses native MCP server integration for fresh analytical perspective and root cause analysis.
